title: PUBLIC HOUSING - 211info
text: WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY PUBLIC HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Manages multiple income-based rental public housing properties and fields complaints about public housing. 204 SW Walnut Avenue Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 80% of the Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (503) 623-8387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-8387 TTY/TTD (877) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for application FEES: No fees for applying. Rent varies by rental site and program. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off Kings Valley Highway 223, North of Rickreall Creek Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Public Housing Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY
